question: Will the yield spread between 10-year and 3-month US Treasury bonds have increased by 2026-04-19 as compared to its value on 2026-04-12?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/T10Y3M once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-12 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-02) was 0.630. (The latest value released in 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity Minus 3-Month Treasury Constant Maturity from the release Interest Rate Spreads.)
background:
The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: Series is calculated as the spread between 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity (BC_10YEAR) and 3-Month Treasury Constant Maturity (BC_3MONTH).
Starting with the update on June 21, 2019, the Treasury bond data used in calculating interest rate spreads is obtained directly from the U.S. Treasury Department (https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/interest-rates/Pages/TextView.aspx?data=yield)..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Percent.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily
